titles.en: Love for the Prophet's Household invites hardship

text: ١١٢. مَنْ أَحَبَّنَا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ فَلْيَسْتَعِدَّ لِلْفَقْرِ جِلْبَاباً.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 112. Whoever loves us, members of the Household (of the Prophet), should be prepared to face destitution.

text: قال السيد الرضى: وقد يؤول ذلك على معنى آخر ليس هذا موضع ذكره.

en.sayed-ali-raza: As-Sayyid ar-Raḍī says: This has been interpreted in a different way as well, but on this occasion is not fit to mention here. [1]
